Bash(cd /c/repo/ipsedigit.github.io && python -c "
import urllib.request, json
# Test different URL formats
urls = [
    'https://huggingface.co/api/models?sort=trending&limit=5',
    'https://huggingface.co/api/models?sort=likes&direction=-1&limit=5',
    'https://huggingface.co/api/models?sort=downloads&direction=-1&limit=5',
]
for url in urls:
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request\(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'test'}\)
        with urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=15\) as resp:
            data = json.loads\(resp.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)\)
            print\(f'OK {url} -> {len\(data\)} results'\)
            if data:
                print\(f'  Keys: {list\(data[0].keys\(\)\)[:8]}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'FAIL {url} -> {e}'\)
" 2>&1)
